nasb.text: And He said to them, “But who do you say that I am?” And Peter answered and said, “The Christ of God.”

esv.text: Then he said to them, “But who do you say that I am?” And Peter answered, “The Christ of God.”

cnv.text: 他又問他們：“你們說我是誰？”彼得回答：“是　神的基督！”

ccb.text: 耶稣对他们说：“那么，你们说我是谁？” 彼得回答说：“你是上帝所立的基督。”

csbs.text: 耶稣问他们：“那么你们呢？你们说我是谁？” 彼得回答说：“是神的基督！”
